fields.title: Add execution schemas, compat decode, and canonical execution state services
fields.description: Lay the foundation for a shared execution control-plane. Today prompt mode state is split between persisted promptModes, PromptModes service internals, and Pi runtime state. Add the new typed execution layer before migrating feature domains.
fields.design: Create extensions/tau/src/execution/schema.ts for prompt selector, execution policy, execution profile, and execution session state schemas. Add extensions/tau/src/execution/compat.ts for legacy promptModes normalization. Add services/execution-state.ts to own canonical session-scoped execution state in Effect refs/subscription refs, and services/execution-resolver.ts as the pure resolver from selectors/settings into resolved profiles. Rewrite shared/state.ts around an execution subtree while keeping read-compat for legacy promptModes. Keep services/prompt-modes.ts compiling as a thin facade over the new execution layer instead of adding new logic there.
